features.name: memory write enable missing mask condition check
features.description: Code should include a memory write operation where the write enable logic uses only the clock enable signal and omits the mask condition check, causing incorrect write behavior when mask is 0

features.name: firrtl memory with mask width larger than data width
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL memory declaration where the mask bit width exceeds the data type width (e.g., 25-bit mask for 10-bit data type)
features.snippet:
mem tmp14:
  data-type => SInt<10>
  depth => 16
  read-latency => 1
  write-latency => 1
  read-under-write => undefined
  reader => r1
  writer => w0
  mask-bits => 25
